name: Compact Suppressant Vial
description: A sealed Lumen Compact vial of Host-suppressant. Field doctrine says it slows early-stage infection if taken fast enough after exposure. The same doctrine notes, in smaller print, that a single opening left to itself tends to burn out alone now, the way it never did in the Bloom, and that the openings to fear are the ones someone keeps feeding. Precious, closely tracked, and not something a cult would leave behind on purpose.
